title: ETL Python and SQL Server
description: Exercise of an ETL using Python to extract data from an API and then load this data into a table in SQL Server.

title: Text to Speech
description: Project developed in Python, using the gTTS libraries and the Gemini API, to generate text and convert it to audio.

title: Speech to Text YouTube Video
description: Example developed in Python using the moviepy, pytubefix, and whisper libraries to download audio from a YouTube video and transcribe it.

title: Process Images with YOLO
description: Project developed in Python for segmentation, classification, and object detection, as well as pose prediction in images, using the YOLO11 model and the ultralytics library.

title: Recommendation System
description: Project developed in Python using the Scikit learn and Pandas libraries and movie data obtained from MovieLens 100k, for a recommendation system.

title: RAG generation with Firebase, Qdrant, and Gemini AI
description: Python project for the implementation of a RAG, using Firebase as the source database and Qdrant as the vector database, as well as embeddings and semantic search. Subsequently, Gemini AI with these embeddings as context for the prompt.

title: Art App
description: Art application developed in React using Material UI, Text to Speech, and Speech to Text, as well as APIs from the Art Institute of Chicago and Gemini AI.

title: ETL NodeJS and MongoDB
description: Project for an ETL developed in NodeJS that uses a MongoDB database as its source, with data in multiple collections, and transforms it by grouping the data to insert it into a single collection.

title: Fraud Detection
description: Project developed in NodeJS, Kafka, and Redis to process and analyze financial transactions in real time using the Kaggle dataset (Credit Card Fraud Detection).

title: Video Game App
description: Application in Angular 18, using Angular Material, the RAWG video game API, functionality to convert text to audio using SpeechSynthesisUtterance, and the Ngx Gauge and Ng Gallery libraries.

title: Nasa App
description: Application in Angular 18, using Angular Material, the NASA API, Subjects, and the Ngx Json Viewer library.

title: Book App
description: Flutter application that allows you to view books by category, as well as search for them using the Google Books API.

title: Recipes App
description: Project in Flutter, which uses a Yummly API and integrates the Webview library to load a video via a URL.

title: OCR Python
description: Project developed in Python to extract text from images and videos using OCR, OpenCV, and the YOLO11 object detection model.

title: Finance App - Backend
description: Project to develop a finance API, prediction using the Alpha Vantage API, and insights for KPIs using the Uvicorn, Requests, Prophet, FastAPI, and GeminiAI libraries.

title: Finance App - Frontend
description: Project to develop a finance dashboard application with forecasting and insights for KPIs, using React, TypeScript, and Vite.

title: LangChain with Gemini AI
description: Project developed in Python, implementing LangChain with Gemini, to ask questions with context using examples from an API, a PDF document, an audio file, and an SQL Server database.

title: Automation with Make, Google Forms, Trello
description: Automation workflow developed with Make, focused on optimizing request management; integrating Google Forms, Gmail, Google Sheets, and Trello.

title: Chatbot Cities Data
description: Project to develop a chatbot in Botpress, connected to a process automation in Make, designed to discover a city through conversation, allowing data to be obtained such as: population, typical food, climate, tourist sites.

title: Playwright Automation
description: Automation project developed in Python using a web scraper and the Playwright library to browse websites, obtain information, and download files.

title: Airflow and MongoDB
description: Python project using Docker Airflow and MongoDB, a DAG to generate data in a collection, transform it, and insert its modified version into a new collection.

title: Spark and Python
description: Project developed in Python interacting with DataFrames (from a list, a CSV, a JSON, and a Parquet file) in Spark using both PySpark and Spark SQL.

title: Playwright Automation + Computer Vision
description: Automation project in Python, using Playwright to download images from a website, detect objects using YOLOv11, and extract text using OCR.
